text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh? Flash, you look low-key exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...I am, a bit. I had a lot of work come up<n>
unexpectedly today.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: That's rough. So you gonna skip training<n>today?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, I will go ahead with it as planned. If<n>I reduce
my practice, I will only suffer<n>for it later trying to
rearrange my plans.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But, like, there's no point trying to<n>overwork
yourself now. You should just<n>relax and do
something fun!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hold up, we can go out right now! I'm a<n>genius!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the offer, but I am not one<n>to
implement dubious theories so<n>hastily...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Come on, just give it a try. Who knows,<n>maybe
you'll grow stronger if you break<n>out of that mold
of yours.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that got you interested, huh? Then<n>how
about a full glam glow-up while<n>we're at it? My
makeup skills are next<n>level!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I'm afraid I'll have to pass after all...
